title: parapolystichum confine
intro: Parapolystichum confine is a species of fern belonging to the family Dryopteridaceae, native to Southeast Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Parapolystichum confine include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Parapolystichum confine are typically dried and used in teas, infusions, or as a poultice to apply directly to affected areas.
